---
title: 'Eternal Perspective'
date: '2011-10-02T20:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6503707603245984080'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/eternal-perspective.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'EMIC'
---

EMIC Sunday 10/02/2011<br /><br />If you get a&nbsp;truly&nbsp;eternal mindset you can never again be discouraged by life here on earth. Bills, Problems, even death of loved ones cannot disturb you. The death of a loved one is not the end of their life and your relationship it is a pause in connection. They are still completing their assignment just as if they were here. There is MORE in your future together than there is in your past. They are waiting for you on the other side...
